findings.title: STATUS.md SPRINT-B and Retell R1 day counts stale by 2 days
findings.detail: .omc/STATUS.md last updated 2026-06-20 still shows SPRINT-B as '30 days overdue' and Retell R1 as '31 days overdue'. As of 2026-06-22 these are 32 and 33 days overdue respectively.
findings.fix_sketch: Update day counts and Last updated timestamp

findings.title: ROADMAP.md blocking decision overdue count stale — '28+ days' should be '33+ days'
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md line 304 reads 'OVERDUE (28+ days)' and 'as of 2026-06-17 (28 days elapsed)'. As of 2026-06-22, 33 days have elapsed since SPRINT-2026-05-A ended 2026-05-20.
findings.fix_sketch: Update '28+ days' to '33+ days' and 'as of 2026-06-17' to 'as of 2026-06-22'
